# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling change

## How to test

Describe the steps reviewers can use to verify this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bun run check` (lint + format + styles + types).
- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated related documentation where needed.
- [ ] This PR is focused and does not include unrelated changes.
